use_cases: Displaying open positions on a company careers page
Filtering and browsing job opportunities by category
Showing job details with salary, location, and remote options
Creating a recruitment board for staffing platforms
Enabling users to click and apply to job listings
ai_summary: A job listing card component designed for displaying employment opportunities with company logos, job titles, salary ranges, location info, and remote work options. Features smooth animations and hover states for an engaging browsing experience on recruitment platforms and company career pages.
